headline: Dogecoin Hits New All Time-High As Elon Musk Takes Twitter Frenzy To A New Level
summary:
Dogecoin (DOGE) reached an all-time high of $0.084 on Sunday evening pushed to the moon by Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk — again.

What Happened: The Shiba Inu-themed cryptocurrency found support from the rap star Snoop Dogg who tweeted a meme at Musk.
